message:
feat(E5.F1.T2): add canary rollout, soak monitoring, and rollback runbook tests (30 tests)

Canary state machine, soak evaluation with auto-rollback thresholds
(consecutive unhealthy, lag budget, error rate), 6-step rollback
runbook, and progressive rollout plan (5%/25%/50%/100% cohorts).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
